description: Heap product analytics — sync users, events, segments, funnels, and user properties via the Heap REST and Server-Side APIs.

install_fields.label: API Key
install_fields.help: Found in Heap Dashboard → Account → Privacy & Security → API Key

install_fields.label: App ID / Account ID
install_fields.help: Your Heap App ID (numeric). Found in Heap Dashboard → Account → General or in your Heap tracking snippet.

rate_limits.note: Heap enforces per-account rate limits on their REST API. Track and identify calls are generally more permissive. Respect 429 responses with Retry-After headers.
